# `src/generated/` ‚Äî generated artifacts (do not edit)

Files here are produced from backend sources and committed so the frontend can
import them synchronously. **Do not edit them by hand** ‚Äî regenerate instead.

| File | Generated by | Source of truth |
|------|--------------|-----------------|
| `snowflakeDataTypes.ts` | `go generate ./internal/snowflake/` (`scripts/gen_datatypes.go`) | `internal/snowflake/datatypes.go` (`snowflake.AllDataTypes`) |

The Go test `TestGeneratedDataTypesInSync` (in `internal/snowflake/`) fails if a
committed artifact drifts from its source, so regenerate after changing the
backend registry.
